title: Wilderness Navigation and in Identifying Plants and Creatures

trained.line: You are trained in wilderness navigation and in identifying plants and creatures. Enabler.

You are trained in wilderness navigation and in identifying plants and creatures. Enabler. Will of a Leader (9 Intellect points): You harden your allies’ dedication and capabilities. Each ally within immediate range gains +1 Edge to one stat of their choice for one hour. You also gain this benefit to one stat of your choice. Action.
